gaps.title: Compiler: trait combo cloth+water+softbody fails
gaps.description: Stress-test combo errored during compilation phase. Error trace: type mismatch in cloth constraint solver initialization when combined with water physics. This blocks the 'flowing-fabric' demo from stress-test run abc123.

gaps.title: Artist requested @holographic_mesh trait (not in compiler)
gaps.description: Reiterate studio run requested this trait for a procedural fashion demo. Artist wants to author holographic_mesh { density: 0.8, refraction: true } on a mannequin object. Trait does not exist in current trait system.

gaps.title: Runtime: networked @collidable object state divergence
gaps.description: Stress-test run detected state divergence for networked colliders in multi-peer scenario. Object position synced but collision bounds not updated, causing hits to fail for 1.2 seconds post-sync on client B.
